title: 12 PCS Gaming Party Bag Fillers,Gaming Paper Party Bags with Carrying Handle,Reusable Games Party Gift Bag Set,4 Patterns Gamer Party Bags for Gifts, Kids Giveaways, Parties, Candy Bags(15×8×21CM)
features: 【High Quality Kraft Paper】Our gaming party bags is made of high quality strong kraft paper, strong and durable, safe to use, the paper bag is tough, not easy to deform, reusable. The handle position is fixed by high viscosity glue and thickened paper, not easy to fall off, better carrying capacity than ordinary gift bags.

【Quantity and Size】This gamer party bags set comes with 12 gift bags per package, 4 colour styles in total, 3 of each style. The size of a single paper bag is about 15*8*21 cm/5.9*3.14*8.26 in (excluding the height of the carrying handle). Height with carry handle is approx. 30 cm/11.8 in. The quantity is sufficient for daily use.

【Practical Design】These gaming paper party bags are flat on the bottom, can be placed upright, and can easily carry up to 2kg; it is ideal for storing cakes, candies, biscuits and other gifts. The pattern on the surface of the paper bag is made of high-tech digital printing, with bright colours and clear content, which is not easy to fade.

【Reusable】Our games party gift bags has well-structured paper round rope twist handles, more durable than ordinary carry handles. The reinforced bottom is very sturdy and stays upright when opened, providing extra stability and ensuring that the paper bag can be safely loaded with items and reusable.

【Wide Application】These game paper gift bags can be used not only for video game parties, game themed parties, but also for gaming carnivals, eSports tournaments, parties and other occasions. You can use them as decorative elements, storage bags for items, and for snacks such as candies, pastries, biscuits and more.
description: Product Specification Material: high quality kraft paper Colour: Various colours Size: 15*8*21 cm/5.9*3.14*8.26 in Height with handle: about 30 cm/11.8 in Packing list 12 x Gamer Party Gift Bags Product features 1.The gamer party gift bag is made of high quality kraft paper, which is stronger and more durable than ordinary paper bags, and can withstand heavier gifts or candies, not easy to break. 2.Well-designed paper twist carry handles are glued, not easy to break like other paper bags, the bottom of the kraft paper bag is flat and firm, you can stand it easily. 3.Multi-functional tote bags are suitable as gifts for Christmas, Thanksgiving, birthday parties, Easter, celebrations and other occasions. It can be used to hold candies, pastries, biscuits and cakes, etc. Friendly Reminder 1.The dimensions are all measured manually and may have slight errors. 2.The colour may be slightly different from the picture due to monitor colour settings. Please refer to the real thing. Thank you for your understanding.
